style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Gyarados's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its metallic surface. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that casts long, precise shadows. Metallic dust particles drift slowly in the air, shimmering with a cold, reflective sheen under the light. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
